questions.question_text: Will humans go extinct before 2100?
Will Huawei sell or announce plans to sell Open RAN equipment before 1 January 2027?
Will another Chinese military base in an African country (excluding Djibouti) be under construction or established by 1 January 2027?
Will Egypt experience an economic collapse (as defined by any of the listed scenarios) in the next 12 months?
Will the United States implement new or expanded export controls on advanced AI chips, cloud access to AI computing, and/or AI model weights in 2025?
Will the U.S. federal government enact legislation that substantively regulates or authorizes regulation of artificial intelligence systems or their development before 1 January 2026?
Will China implement new national-level measures that regulate AI development or restrict its use in 2025?
Will the European “Coalition of the Willing” deploy forces to Ukraine in 2025?
Will at least one European country or the European Union (EU) collectively commit to providing Ukraine with HIMARS-compatible rocket artillery systems or functional substitutes by 31 December 2025?
Will the EU import at least 15 billion cubic meters of natural gas from Russia in any quarter of 2025?
Will government agencies in the U.S., EU, or UK classify mirror biology research under dual-use oversight mechanisms by 31 December 2030?

Will mirror organisms be formally addressed as a biosecurity concern in official proceedings of at least one of the following international forums (BWC Review Conference, G7/G20 Health/Science ministerial meetings, WHO forums) by 31 December 2030?
Will mirror reagents or products be added to the Australia Group export control list or national controlled biological agent lists in the U.S., UK, or Canada by 31 December 2032?
Will any major international non-governmental research funders implement specific policies restricting or requiring oversight of mirror biology research by 31 December 2030?

Before 1 January 2029, will either the U.S. or UK enact a law granting tax incentives to companies that pass an independent security audit for their AI models?
Will the Cambodia-Thailand conflict result in at least 20 deaths between 4 November 2025 and 15 January 2026, inclusive?
Will the EU import at least 19 billion cubic meters of natural gas from Russia in the second half of 2025?
Will at least two European NATO members sign new, publicly announced major defense procurement contracts (over €1 billion each) with non-European suppliers by 31 July 2026?
Will any country announce a new national carbon tax or emissions trading system by 31 July 2026?
Will the United States government implement new or expanded export controls or restrictions explicitly targeting frontier AI model development by 31 July 2026?
Will Sudan’s Rapid Support Forces retake control over Khartoum city by 31 March 2026?
Will there be more people with HIV/AIDS in 2037 than in 2017?

Will the USA be one of the first ten countries to embryo select >10% of its newborns for intelligence?

Will wild influenza B/Yamagata be declared eradicated before 2030?

Will Bayer cease selling all Roundup products, or substantially reformulate all Roundup products in the United States before 2040?

Will an international AI regulatory agency, like IAEA, for oversight of transformative AI systems be established before 2030?
Will a US aircraft carrier be destroyed in combat before 2030?

Will Ukraine start revoking passports of military draft age men residing abroad before 2026?
Will the USMCA be extended promptly at its July 2026 joint review?
Will 0.5 Gt of atmospheric CO2 be removed annually using enhanced rock weathering before 2040?

Will minimum staffing standards for Long-Term Care Facilities of 3.48 hours per resident per day be in effect before May 11, 2027?

Before 2030, will a commercially available, general-purpose robot capable of learning new tasks via video be priced under $20,000 USD?

Will there be more than ten times as many 'Strategic developments' in Central African Republic for the 30 days before 2025-12-28 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Strategic developments' over the 360 days preceding ?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Strategic developments'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Strategic developments' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Strategic developments' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:

to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Violence against civilians' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Violence against civilians' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.
